properties.DETAILS_PAGE_DESCRIPTION:
**Atlas House Padel - KAFD**
A rooftop padel court on Building 2.08 in the heart of KAFD, featuring a cooling system to keep you comfortable, on‑site racket and ball rentals, and convenient showers. It’s perfect for an early‑morning hit or a quick lunchtime match with a colleague. After playing, Atlas House Café is just steps away for a relaxed coffee or lunch.

It is forbidden to play with the Saudi dress!

The ultimate destination for Padel players in Saudi Arabia looking to either learn the sport,improve their skills, or have some fun with friends in a fully equipped facility.
Premium indoor & outdoor padel court designed for performance and comfort. Enjoy high-quality turf, and a spacious layout that delivers the perfect playing experience for all levels.

address.street: Al Shaikh Mohammed Ibn Ibrahim, Al Diriyah

properties.DETAILS_PAGE_DESCRIPTION:
Padel Up – Get Your Game On
In the heart of Diriyah, Padel Up delivers a premium padel experience with high quality courts, extended hours, and a vibrant community. Whether you’re a beginner or a pro, everything here is designed to keep you playing at your best.
Play like A Hero.

Al-Aardh neighborhood. The price includes rackets, balls, towels, and water. There are two private courts for women. Reservations via WhatsApp: 055 744 7422. We have restrooms for both genders with showers. Professional rackets are available for rent at nominal prices starting from 5 riyals. An additional discount is available during off-peak hours only, from 3:00 PM to 6:00 PM.

properties.DETAILS_PAGE_DESCRIPTION: Welcome to the Social Racquet Club!!!

Welcome to the fun side of sport. We feel sport has got lost. Pressure is replacing fun. That’s why we’re on a mission to make sports playful again. Good vibes and good health only. We’re Padelx – a social racquet club.

WE ARE THE SOCIAL ATHLETES!

Welcome to the fun side of sport. We feel sport has got lost. Pressure is replacing fun. That’s why we’re on a mission to make sports playful again. Good vibes and good health only. We’re Padelx – a social racquet club.

Why Train at QF?

 Fully indoor and enclosed facility
 6 premium padel courts
 4 spectator stands for tournaments and events
 Around 5 different training levels available, from beginners to advanced players
 Daily training sessions for all levels
 Professional coaching team
 Dedicated training programs and player development pathways
 On-site café for players and visitors
 Friendly and competitive community atmosphere

Whether you're just starting out or looking to compete at a higher level, QF provides the perfect environment to train, improve, and enjoy the game.
(WE ARE BACK) Quattro, Where Movement Meet Community, Quattro Club
